/opt/rh/gcc-toolset-13/root/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS  -fPIC -std=gnu++17 -Werror -Wno-covered-switch-default -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG  -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -shared -Wl,-soname,libGPUInstrumentationTestLib.so -o libGPUInstrumentationTestLib.so CMakeFiles/GPUInstrumentationTestLib.dir/GPUHello.cpp.o  -lstdc++fs /usr/local/lib/libLLVMCore.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/local/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lrt -ldl -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libz.so /usr/lib64/libzstd.so
